title: Dehradun、Uttarakhand — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Dehradun、Uttarakhand的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Dehradun是Uttarakhand的一個城市，人口約800,000。The capital of Uttarakhand, a scenic valley city at the foothills of the Himalayas, known for its boarding schools and natural beauty.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
